ogTitle: Rokewood Junction vs Rosanna: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rokewood Junction and Rosanna.
heading: Rokewood Junction vs Rosanna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rokewood Junction, Victoria and Rosanna, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rokewood Junction has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Rosanna (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rokewood Junction or Rosanna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rokewood Junction has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Rosanna scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rokewood Junction scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Rosanna scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rokewood Junction or Rosanna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rokewood Junction has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
